g.text: Next.js admin UI · Vercel Workflows · Multi-agent content pipeline · Supabase (Postgres+pgvector+Storage) · Multi-channel publishing
Approval cards · @marketing mentions · weekly analyst posts
Sub-agents call back into apps/web via packages/cp-client
Used for: KB search, brand guidance, metrics, similar/mistakes
RLS scope: every row carries workspace_id
3. preflight LLM (1-token call) · 4. insert workflow_runs row (status=running)
5. engine.start(workflow, input) · returns { workflowRunId, engineRunRef, engine }
VercelEngine — start() via Vercel Workflows SDK
Enqueues publish_jobs · channel cap check · kill-switch
VERCEL WORKFLOWS · apps/web/workflows/** · durable steps with "use workflow" / "use step"
Pure generation path, no LLM concept
Fetch from GA4 / X / LinkedIn APIs
→ synth into learnings for future drafts
embeds rejected drafts for mistake search
Fallback: LLM synthesis if brief missing
In: brief + candidate signed URL + prompt
SEO: meta tags, headings, keyword density
Experiment: A/B variant design + winner pick
memory.ts — load brand/* learnings/* product/* files
llm-registry.ts — model name → AI SDK language model
usage.ts — records llmUsage rows per call
Collection kinds: brand · product · persona · competitor · sop
LinkedInAdapter — UGC posts via LINKEDIN_ACCESS_TOKEN + ORGANIZATION_URN
XAdapter — tweets/threads via X API v2 (OAuth 1.0a)
FacebookAdapter · InstagramAdapter — Meta Graph API (page + IG business)
InternalBlogAdapter — POST into internal blog DB / static site rebuild
Each adapter writes external_id + external_url back to publish_jobs row
Approval cards: packages/agents/src/cards (Slack · Discord · web UI)
DATA LAYER · Supabase (Postgres+pgvector, Storage, Auth) · packages/db schema (36 Drizzle tables)
Goal evaluation reads outcomes vs target
Quota gates: lib/billing on every API call
Signed URLs for judge + UI preview
workspaces 1—N every business table · kb_collections 1—N kb_documents 1—N kb_chunks 1—1 embeddings
workflow_runs 1—1 generation_jobs 1—N generation_job_steps · publish_jobs 1—N metrics → outcomes
Google Gemini — text (fallback), image, video, embed
Errors → Slack ops alert + workflow fail-fast
native overlay text → no template post-0029
Internal blog — direct DB write + rebuild
Gates: daily channel cap · workspace limits ·
X bearer token — public timeline read
Channel-side metrics also via LinkedIn/X APIs
Slack — bot + signing secret · approval cards
WORKFLOW_PUBLISH · WORKFLOW_EMBED · WORKFLOW_CHAT → 0 = legacy BullMQ/Manager · 1 = Vercel Workflow path
EMBEDDING_PROVIDER + EMBEDDING_MODEL → switch between Gemini and OpenAI (re-embed via /api/admin/embeddings/backfill)
settings.image_model · video_model · research_provider · llm_model → workspace-level overrides (resolveSubAgentModel)
AUTH_ALLOWLIST → comma-separated email allowlist for app/auth/callback
LEGACY_WORKSPACE_ID → single-tenant fallback for legacy callers (still honored by lib/billing)
Goal of phased flags: cut over from apps/manager (BullMQ workers) to Vercel Workflows per surface, with rollback.
DETAIL · SINGLE-POST WORKFLOW SEQUENCE (apps/web/workflows/single-post.ts → asset-pipeline.ts → publish.ts)
dispatch: resolveModel → preflight LLM (1-token) → insert workflow_runs
top-N chunks · brand voice · prior rejects
if changes_requested → loop back to step 2 with comments as feedback
generateImage (Gemini NB2) → upload to Storage → signed URL
Judge (vision LLM) scores · retry once if rejected
channel adapter post · gates: cap · kill-switch · test-mode
notify origin thread + schedule metrics fetch (24h)
